formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}f_{k}^{\left(u\right)} & = & \underset{i \in \mathbf{S}^{\left(u\right)}}{\sum} \underset{\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{}{j \in \mathbf{S}^{\left(u\right)} ,}{j > i}}{\sum} v_{k - 1 , i , j} \cdot \left(d_{k , i} - d_{k - 1 , i}\right) \\ & & + \underset{i \in \mathbf{S}^{\left(u\right)}}{\sum} \underset{\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{}{j \in \mathbf{S}^{\left(u\right)} ,}{j > i}}{\sum} \frac{\left(w_{k , i , j} - v_{k - 1 , i , j}\right) \cdot \left(d_{k , i} - d_{k - 1 , i}\right)}{2} .\end{aligned}
